articles.author: Andrew Daniels
articles.title: These Men Thought They Were Digging a Tunnel. They Were Really Digging Their Own Graves. - Yahoo
articles.description: How America’s deadliest industrial disaster was buried along with the workers it killed.
articles.content:
The men at Hawks Nest were hired to carve out a tunnel in a mountain. What they were really doing, though, was mining the same material that would help kill them.
In the early 1930s, workers blasted… [+2977 chars]
